mapper.sql: a.id, a.plan_id, a.stu_id, a.attend_date, a.sign_time, a.sign_status, a.leave_remark, a.create_user, a.create_time, a.update_time, p.plan_name as plan_name, s.student_name as student_name, s.student_no as student_no
mapper.select: SELECT FROM train_attendance a LEFT JOIN train_plan p ON a.plan_id = p.id LEFT JOIN student s ON a.stu_id = s.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO train_attendance (plan_id, stu_id, attend_date, sign_time, sign_status, leave_remark, create_user, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{planId}, #{stuId}, #{attendDate}, #{signTime}, #{signStatus}, #{leaveRemark}, #{createUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM train_attendance WHERE id IN #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM train_attendance a LEFT JOIN train_plan p ON a.plan_id = p.id LEFT JOIN student s ON a.stu_id = s.id WHERE a.plan_id = #{planId} AND a.stu_id = #{stuId} AND a.attend_date = #{attendDate} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM train_attendance a LEFT JOIN train_plan p ON a.plan_id = p.id LEFT JOIN student s ON a.stu_id = s.id WHERE a.plan_id = #{planId} AND a.attend_date = #{attendDate} ORDER BY a.sign_time ASC

SELECT FROM train_attendance a LEFT JOIN train_plan p ON a.plan_id = p.id LEFT JOIN student s ON a.stu_id = s.id WHERE s.student_no = #{studentNo} AND a.plan_id = #{planId} AND a.attend_date = #{attendDate} LIMIT 1
